name: Dispute Avoidance Playbook Lens
summary: Dispute Avoidance Playbook Lens gives legal / risk work a clearer decision structure.
whenToUseIt: Use this when the team needs a stronger way to reason about dispute avoidance playbook lens without adding unnecessary complexity.
steps: Map the signal and constraints that matter most.

example: A team applies Dispute Avoidance Playbook Lens to sort noise from signal and decide which change should happen first.
